name: senior-engineering-skill-pack
description: Curated marketplace for the Senior Engineering Pack — behavior-changing engineering-reasoning skills for Claude Code, vendored from open-source sources.

plugins.name: senior-engineering
plugins.description: ~25 curated behavior-changing engineering-reasoning skills (architecture, system design, debugging discipline, code review, trade-off analysis, failure-mode analysis, production readiness) spanning backend, distributed systems, cloud-native, API design, observability, testing, and AI/LLM engineering.
